'''Clandes Industrial''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-manufacturing corporation that was located on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]], based in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Clandes]]. Its Clandes plant accounted for sixty percent of Ord Cestus' economy, including production of the [[JK-13 security droid]]s. As such, it may have been a subsidiary of [[Cestus Cybernetics]].<ref name="TCD">''[[The Cestus Deception]]''</ref>

{{Company-stub}}

*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
